successor: IBM Systems Group; IBM Power Systems
notes: IBM Enterprise Server Group produced RS/6000; brand retired 2000; became eServer pSeries, then IBM Power Systems.

successor: HP Inc. and Hewlett Packard Enterprise (2015)
notes: HP PA-RISC Unix servers competed with RS/6000; HP split into HP Inc. and HPE in 2015.
